given_name.label: First Name
given_name.tooltip: Enter the user's first name or given name

family_name.label: Last Name
family_name.tooltip: Enter the user's last name or family name

email.label: Email
email.tooltip: Enter a valid email address. This will be used as the username for login

roles.label: Roles
roles.tooltip: Select one or more roles for the user. Each role provides different permissions
roles.helper: At least one role is required

email_verified.label: Email Verified
email_verified.tooltip: Indicates whether the user's email address has been verified. Can only be changed for existing users

enabled.label: Account Enabled
enabled.tooltip: Enable or disable user access to the system

email.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address

roles.too_small: Please select at least one role
